name: Map Chunk Bulk
desc: Sends multiple chunks at once. Used for initial world load and large area updates.

fields.name: chunks
fields.desc: Array of chunk data with X/Z/bitmask/compressed data

encoding: X, Z, bitmask, dataSize, compressed data
notes: S26 is the bulk version of S21 — sends many chunks in a single packet. Used on world join and loading large areas. XRay modules also cancel S26 alongside S21 to prevent chunk updates.

modules.name: XRay
modules.purpose: Same as S21 but for bulk chunk loading. XRay modifies bulk data.

modules.name: Search
modules.purpose: Same as S21 but for bulk chunk loading. XRay modifies bulk data.
